simple_types.name: CTRLA_PRESCALERSelect
simple_types.code:
type CTRLA_PRESCALERSelect is
   Div1,

   Div16,
   Div64,

  with Size => 3;

simple_types.name: CTRLA_PRESCSYNCSelect
simple_types.code:
type CTRLA_PRESCSYNCSelect is
   Gclk,
   Presc,
   Resync)
  with Size => 2;

enumeration_literals.name: Gclk
enumeration_literals.description: Reload or reset the counter on next prescaler clock

enumeration_literals.name: Presc
enumeration_literals.description:
Reload or reset the counter on next generic clock and reset the prescaler
counter

simple_types.name: CTRLBCLR_CMDSelect
simple_types.code:
type CTRLBCLR_CMDSelect is
   None,
   Retrigger,
   Stop,
   Update,
   Readsync,
   Dmaos)
  with Size => 3;

enumeration_literals.name: None
enumeration_literals.description: Force a start, restart or retrigger

enumeration_literals.name: Update
enumeration_literals.description: Force a read synchronization of COUNT

simple_types.name: CTRLBSET_CMDSelect
simple_types.code:
type CTRLBSET_CMDSelect is
   None,
   Retrigger,
   Stop,
   Update,
   Readsync,
   Dmaos)
  with Size => 3;

enumeration_literals.name: None
enumeration_literals.description: Force a start, restart or retrigger

enumeration_literals.name: Update
enumeration_literals.description: Force a read synchronization of COUNT

simple_types.name: EVCTRL_EVACTSelect
simple_types.code:
type EVCTRL_EVACTSelect is
   Off,
   Retrigger,
   Count,
   Start,
   Stamp,
   Ppw,
   Pwp,
   Pw)
  with Size => 3;

enumeration_literals.name: Off
enumeration_literals.description: Start, restart or retrigger TC on event

enumeration_literals.name: Stamp
enumeration_literals.description: Period catured in CC0, pulse width in CC1

enumeration_literals.name: Ppw
enumeration_literals.description: Period catured in CC1, pulse width in CC0
